title: LED Kannala Lyrics Pencil Song Lyrics
stanzas:
LED Kannala Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Hariharasudhan & Maalavika Sundar
Music: GV Prakashkumar

LED kannala katti pottale
Strawberry lippaala otti vachcha
Tuninge illaama paada vachcha
Control-ey illaama aada vachcha .

Bejaaru pannaadha
Asaltu aeiyyaadha.
Kathiri sollaala
Enna nee keeraadha.

LED kannala katti pottale
Strawberry lippaala otti vachcha

LKG ponna naan 10 KG love thaan
Ennoda nenjukul sumakka vachcha.

Free birda naanum thaan suthuna
Enna thaan love birda aakkithaan parakkavacha.

Sandaaliye sandaaliye
Emmanasa pandhaadura.
Thindaadura thindaadura
Emmoochula ini neethaandi.

Velvettu kannathil
Kalvettu muththa
Toll gate illaama kuththi vachcha.

WhatsApp Viber irundhaalum
Contactse illaama kaththa vachcha.

Unnaalathaan vetkapatten
Unkitta thaan sikkikitten
Unmoochula naan sokkiputten.
Un jodiyaa ini naan vaaren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of LED Kannala?

The song is a peppy and energetic dance number that captures youthful exuberance.

Who are the singers of LED Kannala?

The song is sung by Hariharasudhan and Maalavika Sundar.

Who composed the music for Pencil?

The music for Pencil was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song LED Kannala released?

The song was released in 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Pencil, the song LED Kannala brings a burst of energy and fun, perfectly capturing the spirit of youthful joy and celebration. With its catchy tune and lively beats, the song encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The vibrant vocals by Hariharasudhan and Maalavika Sundar add to the song's infectious charm. It's a track that evokes happiness and is ideal for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the vibrant energy of LED Kannala from the movie Pencil, where GV Prakash Kumar's lively beats meet the dynamic vocals of Hariharasudhan and Maalavika Sundar. This peppy duet is perfect for getting you on your feet and into the groove. Dive into the colorful world of Pencil with this unforgettable track!
stanzaMeanings: When the LED lights up, and the strawberry lips are pressed together, it makes me sing without tuning and dance without control.
Don't get upset, don't act too cool. Why are you acting like a knife?
When the LED lights up, and the strawberry lips are pressed together.
I am like an LKG girl, but I have to carry 10 KG of love in my heart.
I was a free bird flying around, but you made me a love bird and made me fly.
Oh sandalwood, oh sandalwood, you are playing with my heart. You are eating up my breath, now it's only you.
On the velvet cheek, a carved kiss was placed without a toll gate.
Even with WhatsApp and Viber, you made me shout without contacts.
Because of you, I felt shy. I got caught with you. I got absorbed in your breath. Now I will come as your pair.
